reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención del playero, pero una sola persona para atender hace que la cola sea siempre grande y haya que esperar.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the beach attendant is very good, but only one person serving makes the line always long and you have to wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bk9yTUZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Tienen una demora enorme en la atención,  recomiendo cargar combustibles en otra estación de servicio .

(Translated by Google)
They have a huge delay in service, I recommend filling up at another gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5Mkx2WWxnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención pero necesita surtidores más modernos, el sistema de cobro afuera y un ayudante ya que estaba un señor atendido solo y tenía que entrar para cobrar con tarjeta.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, but it needs more modern pumps, a payment system outside, and an assistant, since there was a man being served alone and he had to go inside to collect by card.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdDQtSDJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Cola interminable para cargar nafta. Una sola persona que trabaja, que hace todo, y lento. Carguen en otros pueblos, en Humahuaca es una perdida de tiempo

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. Endless line to get gas. Only one person working, doing everything, and even then, it's slow. Fill up in other towns; in Humahuaca, it's a waste of time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTcTdydkFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Se  demora mucho, las máquinas expendedoras de combustible son muy viejas y en ocaciones fallan y hay que esperar.  El servicompras no funciona

(Translated by Google)
It takes a long time; the fuel pumps are very old and sometimes break down, so you have to wait. The convenience store isn't working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTMC0zeGdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es la única estación se servicio de Humahuaca. Está dentro de la ciudad. Al ser pequeña se vuelve un poco incómoda para maniobrar o permanecer en la playa. Sanitarios limpios, están cerrados, se debe pedir la llave a los playeros. Tiene un pequeño negocio donde puedes comprar bebidas.

(Translated by Google)
This is the only service station in Humahuaca. It's located within the city. Because it's small, it's a bit awkward to maneuver or stay on the beach. The restrooms are clean, but they're locked; you have to ask the beach attendants for the key. There's a small shop where you can buy drinks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdmVxSm5nRRAB
